title: erigeron lassenianus var. lassenianus
intro: Erigeron lassenianus var. lassenianus, also known as Lassen's fleabane, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. It is a member of the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits in promoting healing and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Lassen's fleabane can be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications, such as salves or creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
